sourceEvidence.note: HUD publishes public housing agency contact information.
ACL points to the State Assistive Technology Program Directory and explains AT state program functions.
RSA lists state VR agencies and contact websites for all states and territories.

sourceEvidence.source: Legal Services Corporation Get Legal Help
sourceEvidence.note: LSC is the national civil legal-aid source family.

targets.sourceName: HUD Public Housing Agency Contact Information
targets.whyNeeded: Find local public housing agencies and rental-assistance routing for families needing housing help.
targets.promotionRule: Discovery or staging only until extracted rows pass public-safe validation.

targets.whyNeeded: Discover housing counseling, affordable housing, and local HUD-connected resources.
targets.promotionRule: Discovery or staging only until extracted rows pass public-safe validation.

targets.promotionRule: Discovery or staging only until extracted rows pass public-safe validation.

targets.whyNeeded: Find state VR agencies for jobs, transition, supported employment, and disability employment routing.

targets.sourceName: Legal Services Corporation Get Legal Help
targets.whyNeeded: Find civil legal-aid organizations for benefits, housing, education, and family legal support.

targets.sourceName: NDRN Protection and Advocacy Member Agencies

targets.whyNeeded: Discover local help for transportation, utilities, food, housing, and emergency support.

targets.expectedExtractionFields: clinic_name, address, phone, website, services, sliding_fee

targets.whyNeeded: Discover certified home health and care providers for care-related gaps.
